query:
-- Verificar usuários
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN role='admin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as admins,
       SUM(CASE WHEN role='user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as clients
FROM users;

-- Verificar transações
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_transactions,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo='debito' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as debitos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo='pagamento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pagamentos
FROM transactions;

-- Verificar últimas 5 transações
SELECT id, admin_id, cliente_id, tipo, valor, descricao, data 
FROM transactions 
ORDER BY data DESC 
LIMIT 5;
